title: arthropteris webbiana
intro: Arthropteris webbiana, also known as the New Zealand tree fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Osmundaceae. The medicinal properties of Arthropteris webbiana include its use in treating various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of the plant are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as protect against cell damage. The herbal preparations of Arthropteris webbiana include decoctions and infusions, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
